Home.title: ZhenXiao Mark Yu
Home.subtitle: Software engineer, frontend systems builder, game developer, and digital artist building precise interfaces with cinematic restraint.
Home.featuredDescription: Production-grade case studies across web apps, AI tooling, and data visualisation.
Home.latestDescription: Field notes and devlog — short, dated, opinionated.
Home.toolsDescription: A small, real personal stack — the things I actually use, with notes on why.
Home.galleryDescription: Black-and-white photography, digital art, and contact sheets — placeholder frames hold the structure.
Home.contactSheetPlaceholder: Open the gallery to browse, like, save, and share frames.
Home.mediaDescription: Video and process pages are presentationally ready — final posters and clips replace these frames later.
Home.closingStatement: One archive. Software, games, art, writing — built deliberately.

About.intro: A China to Canada software and art path shaped by Western University, J.D. Power, game development, and a sustained interest in systems that feel human.
